archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Adapted for African Coding Bootcamp)
vibe: Elite, focused, technical, minimal, tactical, high-energy

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6 for tight dense layouts.

components.cards: Flat background, 1px solid border-zinc-800, 0px border-radius, no shadow. Technical grid look.
components.buttons: Sharp edges, high contrast. Primary: bg-[#00FF66] text-black font-bold hover:bg-[#00CC52]. Secondary: border border-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-800 text-white.
components.inputs: Shadcn based, rounded-none, border-zinc-700 bg-[#121212] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00FF66] text-white.
components.navigation: Solid background bg-[#0A0A0A] with hard bottom border border-zinc-800. Visible links on desktop, primary CTA on right.
components.code_editor: Monaco or custom styled textarea with JetBrains Mono, syntax highlighting using #00FF66, #FFCC00, #FF3B30 on #121212 background.
components.charts: Shadcn charts/recharts using green/yellow accents. Tooltips must be dark with sharp borders.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Always change background or border color. Use transition-colors duration-200. Text must remain legible.
motion_and_interaction.loading: ASCII or mono-spaced terminal loaders. E.g., '[====>    ] Loading...'

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Text over images MUST have gradient overlay.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='enroll-button')

instructions_to_main_agent: Import Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts in index.css.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout and Shadcn for complex interactives (dropdowns, dialogs).
Do NOT use Inter. Use Outfit for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Implement 'The Control Room Grid' for the Admin Analytics Dashboard.
Use stark, 0px border radius (rounded-none) for all cards and inputs to fit the 'bootcamp/terminal' look.
Accent color is #00FF66 (Volt Green) to give an energetic, pan-African tech vibe.
Ensure the primary CTA buttons use text-[#0A0A0A] on bg-[#00FF66] for contrast.
Include data-testid on all interactive elements.
Avoid glassmorphism. Use solid dark colors (#0A0A0A and #121212) with 1px #27272A borders.
Use JetBrains Mono or similar monospaced font for all code blocks, code exercises, and technical data.
For the lesson viewer with code examples and the code exercise environment, present it with an IDE-like split pane.
